title: Pleomele talbotii
taxonomy: Pleomele talbotii is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. It belongs to the genus Pleomele, which comprises several species of flowering plants native to tropical regions. The Asparagaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants that also includes species of asparagus and lilies. Pleomele talbotii is a type of fan palm or bird of paradise plant, known for its distinctive leaves and flowering habits. The classification of Pleomele talbotii reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the Asparagaceae family.
